title: v0.3.1: Open Source Release
text:
Consuelo is now fully open source! Release the codebase under MIT license with complete documentation for self-hosting and community contributions.

  • Full source code on GitHub
  • Self-hosting documentation
  • Docker deployment guides
  • Community Discord launched

title: v0.3.0: Analytics Dashboard
text:
Real-time analytics dashboard with call metrics, team performance tracking, and historical trends. Track what matters for your sales team.

  • Call volume metrics
  • Connect rate tracking
  • Average call duration
  • Team leaderboards

title: v0.2.1: Contact Management + Queue System
text:
Built-in contact management with CSV import, phone normalization, and intelligent queue system for high-volume outreach campaigns.

  • CSV import with field mapping
  • Automatic phone normalization
  • Queue categories and prioritization
  • DNC list filtering

title: v0.2.0: AI Coaching Beta
text:
Real-time AI coaching powered by Groq and OpenAI. Get live suggestions, objection handling tips, and call analysis during and after conversations.

  • Real-time transcription
  • Live coaching suggestions
  • Post-call analysis
  • Structured output via Zod schemas

title: v0.1.1: Warm & Cold Call Transfers
text:
Conference-based call transfer architecture. Initiate warm transfers with consultation, or cold transfer directly — both powered by Twilio conferences.

  • Cold transfer (blind)
  • Warm transfer with consultation
  • Hold/unhold during transfer
  • Transfer cancellation support

title: v0.1.0: Power Dialer Launch
text:
Initial release of Consuelo's power dialer with local presence dialing. Make more calls, connect with more prospects, all from your browser.

  • Browser-based calling via Twilio
  • Local presence (geo-proximity caller ID)
  • Caller ID lock to prevent conflicts
  • Parallel dialing (3 concurrent lines)
